sectionHelp.Research Summary & AI Direction:
Summarizes the campaign brief and surfaces the core challenge and creative direction the AI recommends.
- Objective: the campaign goal
- Core Challenge: the central problem to solve
- AI Direction: the strategic direction suggested by AI
sectionHelp.Deep-dive Persona:
A deep profile of the target audience — name, beliefs, pain points, motivations. Makes clear who the copy is speaking to.
Emotional trigger keywords are the core vocabulary to leverage in copy.
sectionHelp.Brand Fit Score:
A 0-100% score for brand-to-campaign fit.
- Functional: functional fit
- Emotional: emotional fit
- Cultural: cultural fit
sectionHelp.Market Opportunity & Risk:
Analysis of opportunities and risks in the market.
- Opportunity Gap: the space competitors are missing
- Risk: keywords or trends to watch out for
sectionHelp.Competitive Keywords: Keywords competitors have already claimed. Using them verbatim in your copy makes differentiation hard — avoid or redefine them.
sectionHelp.Untapped Keywords: Sensory and emotional keyword spaces no competitor has claimed yet. Lean on these to build a distinctive brand language.
sectionHelp.Category Narrative Shift:
Shows the shift from the old narrative in the category to a new one.
Your copy should be written on top of this new narrative.
sectionHelp.Emotional Job To Be Done:
The emotional job the customer truly wants your product to handle.
This sentence is the starting point for every copy. Write it in the form "I want to ___".
sectionHelp.Cultural Tension Map: Cultural tensions present in the target market. Understanding and leveraging them creates resonant copy.
sectionHelp.Copy Implications & Guardrails:
Mandatory guidelines for copywriting.
- DO: elements the copy must include
- DON'T: elements to avoid
sectionHelp.Recommended Keywords: Core keywords the AI recommends for your copy, synthesized from the analysis. Weave them in naturally.

helpTooltip: Click for an AI assistant explanation
